advert.description: The TESCO logo and 'Every little helps' tagline are clearly visible on the promotional table setting before cutting away.
Dove deodorant bottles and women using the product are shown, ending with the product line-up and 'Advanced Care' text.
Feet racing across the obstacle course and the Ninja Warrior logo are displayed as the ad transitions out.
The 'ideal HOME SHOW' graphic with dates and location ('Olympia London') is on screen alongside celebrity sponsor faces.
The Neom logo with 'Opening 2027' and website text is displayed on a black background, marking the end of the campaign.
The screen displays the 'Cadbury WORLDWIDE HIDE' search instruction over a map, transitioning into the Find My Past intro.
The Find My Past logo, family tree interface, and '7-DAY FREE TRIAL' badge are shown before the next programme promo begins.
